name: EdwBhiMbrBaseTableLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS ( SELECT mbrEnr.PROD_ID, mbrEnr.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, mbr.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY, mbr.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK, COALESCE(mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5,' ') AS MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, CASE WHEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD IN ('AK','AL','AR','AZ','CA','CO','CT','DC','DE','FL','GA','HI','IA','ID','IL','IN','KS','KY','LA','MA','MD','ME','MI','MN','MO','MS','MT','NC','ND','NE','NH','NJ','NM','NV','NY','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VA','VT','WA','WI','WV','WY') THEN 'US' WHEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD IN ('NA','UNK','AA','AE','AP') THEN 'UN' ELSE mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD END AS NATION, CASE WHEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD IN ('AK','AL','AR','AZ','CA','CO','CT','DC','DE','FL','GA','HI','IA','ID','IL','IN','KS','KY','LA','MA','MD','ME','MI','MN','MO','MS','MT','NC','ND','NE','NH','NJ','NM','NV','NY','OH','OK','OR','PA','RI','SC','SD','TN','TX','UT','VA','VT','WA','WI','WV','WY') THEN (SELECT CASE WHEN fips.CNTY_FIPS_NO IS NOT NULL THEN mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD + fips.CNTY_FIPS_NO ELSE '     ' END FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.FIPS_D fips WHERE fips.ST_CD = mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD AND fips.CNTY_NM = mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_CNTY_NM) ELSE '     ' END AS COUNTY, mbr.MBR_GNDR_CD, grp.PRNT_GRP_ID, mbrEnr.GRP_ID, mbrEnr.SUBGRP_ID, mbr.MBR_RELSHP_CD, mbr2.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AS MBR_UNIQ_KEY_2, mbrEnr.CLS_ID, prd.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN, prd.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN, prd.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN, prd.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD, prd.PROD_ABBR, mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK, mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK, prd.PROD_SH_NM, mbr.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD, mbrEnr.PROD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_ENR_D mbrEnr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D grp, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROD_D prd, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr2 WHERE mbrEnr.MBR_SK = mbr.MBR_SK AND mbr.SUB_MBR_SK = mbr2.MBR_SK AND mbrEnr.GRP_SK = grp.GRP_SK AND mbrEnr.PROD_SK = prd.PROD_SK AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_ELIG_IN = 'Y' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_CLS_PLN_PROD_CAT_CD = 'MED' AND mbrEnr.PROD_SH_NM IN ('PCB','PC','BCARE','BLUE-ACCESS','BLUE-SELECT','BLUESELECT+','HP','BMADVH','BMADVP') AND mbrEnr.CLS_ID <> 'MHIP' AND mbrEnr.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10023000','10024000') AND grp.PRNT_GRP_ID <> '650600000' AND mbrEnr.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.StartDate}' ), cte_transform AS ( SELECT '240' AS BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, SUBSTRING(cte_source.PROD_ID + REPLICATE(' ',15),1,15) AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, SUBSTRING(cte_source.MBR_UNIQ_KEY + REPLICATE(' ',22),1,22) AS MBR_ID, CASE WHEN cte_source.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY=0 THEN SUBSTRING(cte_source.MBR_UNIQ_KEY + REPLICATE(' ',22),1,22) ELSE CAST(cte_source.MBR_INDV_BE_KEY AS VARCHAR(22)) END AS CONSIS_MBR_ID, 'FCTS ' AS TRACEABILITY_FLD, CASE WHEN LEN(cte_source.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK)=0 OR cte_source.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK='NA' OR cte_source.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK='UNK' THEN REPLICATE(' ',8) ELSE REPLACE(cte_source.MBR_BRTH_DT_SK,'-','') END AS MBR_DOB, CASE WHEN cte_source.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 IS NULL THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_source.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5)='' THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN TRY_CAST(dbo.trim_default(cte_source.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5) AS INT)=0 THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) WHEN dbo.trim_default(cte_source.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5) IN ('00000','99999') THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) ELSE cte_source.MBR_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 END AS MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, CASE WHEN cte_source.NATION='US' THEN 'US' WHEN cte_source.NATION IS NULL THEN 'UN' ELSE cte_source.NATION END AS MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, CASE WHEN cte_source.COUNTY IS NULL THEN REPLICATE(' ',5) ELSE cte_source.COUNTY END AS MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, CASE WHEN LEN(cte_source.MBR_GNDR_CD)=0 OR cte_source.MBR_GNDR_CD IN ('NA','UNK','UNKGNDR') THEN 'U' ELSE cte_source.MBR_GNDR_CD END AS MBR_GNDR, CASE WHEN cte_source.GRP_ID='10025000' THEN 'BLU' ELSE 'NON' END AS MBR_CONFITY_CD, SUBSTRING(cte_source.PRNT_GRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',14),1,14) AS ACCT, SUBSTRING(cte_source.GRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',14),1,14) AS GRP_ID, SUBSTRING(cte_source.SUBGRP_ID + REPLICATE(' ',10),1,10) AS SUBGRP_ID, dbo.trim_custom(cte_source.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK,'-','A') AS COV_BEG_DT, dbo.trim_custom(cte_source.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK,'-','A') AS COV_END_DT, CASE WHEN cte_source.MBR_RELSHP_CD='SUB' THEN '18' WHEN cte_source.MBR_RELSHP_CD='SPOUSE' THEN '01' WHEN cte_source.MBR_RELSHP_CD='DPNDT' THEN '19' ELSE 'G8' END AS MBR_RELSHP, SUBSTRING(cte_source.PROD_ID + REPLICATE(' ',15),1,15) AS HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, SUBSTRING(cte_source.MBR_UNIQ_KEY_2 + REPLICATE(' ',22),1,22) AS SUB_ID, CASE WHEN cte_source.GRP_ID IN ('10000000','10001000','10003000') THEN 'ACT' WHEN LEFT(cte_source.CLS_ID,1)='R' THEN 'RET' WHEN LEFT(cte_source.CLS_ID,1)='C' THEN 'COB' ELSE 'ACT' END AS ENR_ELIG_STTUS, 'X' AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, 'X' AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, 'X' AS DEDCT_CAT, CASE WHEN cte_source.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN='Y' THEN 'B ' ELSE 'N ' END AS MHCD_ENR_BNF, cte_source.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN AS PDX_BNF_IN, cte_source.PROD_MNTL_HLTH_COV_IN AS MHCD_BNF_IN, cte_source.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN AS MED_BNF_IN, cte_source.PROD_HLTH_COV_IN AS HOSP_BNF_IN, cte_source.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte_source.PROD_SH_NM_DLVRY_METH_CD AS BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, cte_source.PROD_ABBR AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, cte_source.PROD_ABBR AS PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, CASE WHEN cte_source.PROD_DRUG_COV_IN='Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'X' END AS PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, 'XX' AS PDX_BNF_TIERS, cte_source.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, cte_source.MBR_ENR_EFF_DT_SK, cte_source.MBR_ENR_TERM_DT_SK, cte_source.PROD_SK, cte_source.PROD_SH_NM FROM cte_source ), cte_final AS ( SELECT * FROM cte_transform ) SELECT * FROM cte_final

JOB NAME:  EdwBhiMbrBaseTableLoad


DESCRIPTION:  Extract member data to be sent to BCBSA for BHI (Blue Health Intelligence)


CALLED BY:  EdwBhiMemExtrSeq

HASH FILES:  


RERUN INFORMATION: 

             PREVIOUS RUN SUCCESSFUL:   Nothing to reset. 
             PREVIOUS RUN ABORTED:         Nothing to reset, just restart.

                                                                                                             name while extracting in the source query

Annotations:
BHI Member Extract 
Initial file: 2010-01-01 to 2012-12-31

Incremental file monthly
Writes to a common control totals file
Extract & code all fields except those related to COB
Create dataset for further processing
08-28-2013
Coded for our Use Cases only. When working properly, remove MBR_UNIQ_KEY IN(list) and the comment indicators /* and */ to reinstate the full WHERE clause.
